description_long: This object is a detailed miniature representation of a theme park, featuring a central grand building with a symmetrical layout, surrounded by lush green landscaping and clusters of trees. The main structure is flanked by paved pathways and driveways, with a prominent entrance road leading up to the building. The park is bordered by stylized rocky outcrops and dense foliage, creating a naturalistic boundary. A water feature or canal runs parallel to one side of the park, adding visual interest and separating different zones. The overall layout is organized and scenic, evoking the feel of a well-maintained, destination theme park with a focus on gardens and architectural elegance.
description: A miniature theme park with a central grand building, landscaped gardens, rocky borders, and a water feature, all arranged in a scenic, organized layout.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance road, central building, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and rocks on both sides.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the park, the central building, and the rocky outcrops and trees along the perimeter.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the central building, dense clusters of rocks and trees, and the water feature running along one side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the park's depth, the central building, and the extensive rocky and green landscaping.
